name: Device Health Monitor
description: Monitors device connectivity, battery levels, firmware versions, and overall health status for all registered IoT devices.
author: Cocapn

onDeviceOffline.description: Fires when a device has not communicated for the configured offline threshold

onDeviceOnline.description: Fires when a previously offline device comes back online

onBatteryLow.description: Fires when a device battery drops below 20%

onBatteryCritical.description: Fires when a device battery drops below 10%

onFirmwareUpdateAvailable.description: Fires when a new firmware version is available for a device

onSignalWeak.description: Fires when a device's wireless signal drops below -85 dBm

onDailyDigest.description: Generates a daily health summary at the configured time
